title: Simple Transport HUD
description: A Hud mod for different transports in Minecraft
body:
# Simple Transport HUD

Simple Transport HUD adds simple HUD:s to many transports in Minecraft.

The mod comes with an extensive config. You can access it with ModMenu and YACL


Transports included:
- Elytra
- Minecarts
- Boats
- Horses / Donkys
- Happy Ghasts
- Nautlius
- Strider

Examples:
- Elytra ![Elytra Example](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lukasabbe/SimpleTransportHud/refs/heads/main/images/ElytraExample.png)
- Boat ![Boat example](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lukasabbe/SimpleTransportHud/refs/heads/main/images/BoatExample.png)
- Minecart ![Minecart Example](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lukasabbe/SimpleTransportHud/refs/heads/main/images/BoatExample.png)
- Horse ![Horse example](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lukasabbe/SimpleTransportHud/refs/heads/main/images/HorseExample.png)
- Happy Ghast ![Happy Ghast example](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lukasabbe/SimpleTransportHud/main/images/HappyGhastExample.png)
- Nautilus ![Nautilus Example](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lukasabbe/SimpleTransportHud/main/images/NautilusExample.png)
- Strider ![Strider Example
](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lukasabbe/SimpleTransportHud/main/images/StriderExample.png)
